response.justification: Highly experienced full-stack engineer with 20+ years across web, mobile, and embedded systems, deep TypeScript/Node.js/React work, and directly relevant recent experience building AI-agent infrastructure including MCP code generators — a strong match for the role's AI agent requirement. Background in TDD, multiple languages, Docker/Kubernetes, MongoDB, and AWS aligns well with the stack. Gaps around Nest.js, Vitest, and Kotlin specifically are minor relative to the breadth and depth shown; worth an interview to validate framework-specific depth and recent React/Nest patterns.
strengths: Direct AI-agent and MCP code-generator experience matching a key requirement
Long full-stack track record with TypeScript, Node.js, React, MongoDB, AWS, Docker/Kubernetes
Strong software-craftsmanship culture: TDD, CI/CD, trunk-based development, workshops/teaching
concerns: No explicit Nest.js, Vitest, or Kotlin experience listed
Significant career investment in D-lang ecosystem, less directly relevant to the primary stack
PostgreSQL and auth/security best-practices not explicitly evidenced
